metadata.description: Smart contract audit response toolkit — validate findings with PoC tests, then resolve confirmed vulnerabilities using TDD. Review and resolve in one plugin.

plugins.name: web3-audit-response-toolkit
plugins.description: Two-skill toolkit for smart contract audit response: (1) reviewing-audit-reports validates findings with PoC tests and grades audit quality, (2) resolving-audit-findings converts confirmed PoCs into regression tests and implements fixes using TDD.
